name: Extension of Penalty Collection Period

eligibility.description: Requires payment of 15% of the assessed penalty and the filing of a refund claim within 30 days of notice and demand.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can halt IRS levy and collection proceedings for penalties under sections 6700 or 6701 by paying 15% of the penalty and filing a claim for refund within 30 days.
